name: Cohere Health
description: Cohere Health's Cohere Unify™ is a clinical intelligence platform that connects utilization management, payment integrity, appeals, care management, quality, and claims operations for health plans to improve efficiency and financial performance

name: Flatiron Health
description: Flatiron Health collects and analyzes real-world cancer patient data using AI to generate actionable insights that help oncology stakeholders make faster, better-informed treatment decisions

name: Availity
description: Availity operates a healthcare digital platform that connects payers, providers, and health IT companies to streamline administrative workflows including claims processing, prior authorization, eligibility verification, and payment management

name: Waystar
description: Waystar provides an AI-powered healthcare payments platform that automates billing, claims management, denial recovery, and revenue cycle operations for healthcare providers

name: Myndshft
description: Myndshft is a generative AI-powered platform that automates both medical and pharmacy prior authorizations in real-time across healthcare systems, payers, pharmacies, and providers

name: Rhyme
description: Based on the website text provided, Rhyme is not a healthcare company—it's a social media platform that allows users to filter content by mood preferences (educational, news, politics, funny, etc.)

name: CoverMyMeds
description: CoverMyMeds is a digital platform that streamlines the prior authorization process for prescription medications in the U.S. healthcare system

name: Humata Health
description: Humata Health provides an AI-powered prior authorization automation platform that streamlines the approval process for medical procedures, drugs, and payers by using intelligent automation, policy matching, and real-time payer connectivity
